scripts.build:smoke-ui: tsx scripts/prepare-smoke-dist.ts && ROOMY_NEXT_DIST_DIR=.roomy-smoke prisma generate && ROOMY_NEXT_DIST_DIR=.roomy-smoke next build
scripts.test:signals: node --import tsx --test src/lib/signals/baseline.test.ts src/lib/signals/scan-service.test.ts src/lib/signals/attribution.test.ts src/lib/signals/summary.test.ts
scripts.test:observe: node --import tsx --test src/lib/observe/secrets.test.ts src/lib/observe/registry.test.ts src/lib/observe/engine/pricelabs-map.test.ts src/lib/observe/engine/wheelhouse-map.test.ts src/lib/observe/engine/http.test.ts src/lib/observe/snapshot.test.ts src/lib/observe/observation-window.test.ts src/lib/observe/peer-ladder.test.ts src/lib/observe/learnings-core.test.ts src/lib/observe/client-profile.test.ts src/lib/observe/global-methodology.test.ts
scripts.test:pricing-anchors: node --import tsx --test src/lib/pricing/market-anchor.test.ts src/lib/pricing/multi-unit-anchor.test.ts src/lib/pricing/multi-unit-occupancy.test.ts src/lib/pricing/peer-set.test.ts src/lib/pricing/peer-shape.test.ts src/lib/pricing/trial-pricing.test.ts src/lib/pricing/keydata-fallback.test.ts src/lib/agents/pricing-comparison/agent.test.ts src/lib/agents/pricing-comparison/trial-events.test.ts src/lib/agents/pricing-comparison/cross-sectional-demand.test.ts src/lib/agents/pricing-comparison/holiday-calendar.test.ts src/lib/agents/pricing-comparison/booking-curve.test.ts src/lib/agents/pricing-comparison/near-term-occupancy.test.ts src/lib/agents/pricing-comparison/dow-multiplier.test.ts src/lib/agents/pricing-comparison/snapshot-dedup.test.ts app/components/revenue-dashboard/calendar-utils.test.ts src/lib/reports/pricing-report-assembly.test.ts
scripts.test:smoke-ui: npm run build:smoke-ui && ROOMY_NEXT_DIST_DIR=.roomy-smoke tsx scripts/test-smoke-ui.ts
